creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Thu Jan  3 11:36:44 2013
New Revision: 309869
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/309869

Log:
  - update to 1.1.5
  
  PR:		174924
  Submitted by:	Gasol Wu <gasol.wu@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/pear-PHP_TokenStream/Makefile
  head/devel/pear-PHP_TokenStream/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/pear-PHP_TokenStream/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/pear-PHP_TokenStream/Makefile	Thu Jan  3 11:36:06 2013	(r309868)
+++ head/devel/pear-PHP_TokenStream/Makefile	Thu Jan  3 11:36:44 2013	(r309869)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	PHP_TokenStream
-PORTVERSION=	1.1.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.1.5
 CATEGORIES=	devel pear
 MASTER_SITES=	http://pear.phpunit.de/get/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	pear-
@@ -20,9 +20,6 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	pear>=1.9.4:${PORTSDIR}/dev
 PEAR_CHANNEL=	phpunit
 PEAR_AUTOINSTALL=	yes
 
-DEFAULT_PHP_VER=5
-IGNORE_WITH_PHP=4
-
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 .include "${PORTSDIR}/devel/pear/bsd.pear.mk"
 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Modified: head/devel/pear-PHP_TokenStream/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/pear-PHP_TokenStream/distinfo	Thu Jan  3 11:36:06 2013	(r309868)
+++ head/devel/pear-PHP_TokenStream/distinfo	Thu Jan  3 11:36:44 2013	(r309869)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (PEAR/PHP_TokenStream-1.1.3.tgz) = 9be9fd9e9bcd096d1d6708024513281f3bb8cd08e48a20acaf575a6c7b5a16b8
-SIZE (PEAR/PHP_TokenStream-1.1.3.tgz) = 9860
+SHA256 (PEAR/PHP_TokenStream-1.1.5.tgz) = 9ac8f3c2345d5a65920dd176cbe4334b8f4e52511bcb617967cc925e4a8b7945
+SIZE (PEAR/PHP_TokenStream-1.1.5.tgz) = 9859
